source_name: Code4rena Kinetiq Findings and Analysis Report (2025-04) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_title: Missing Method to Remove Stale Validators
summary: The contract lacks a mechanism to remove inactive validators, allowing stale data to persist and potentially skew performance metrics.
root_cause: QA/low-risk implementation weakness described in the final C4 low/non-critical report.
why_not_medium_or_high: the issue is presented in the final report low/non-critical section and does not by itself establish a permissionless high-impact exploit or direct loss of principal assets
operational_risk: The contract lacks a mechanism to remove inactive validators, allowing stale data to persist and potentially skew performance metrics.
recommended_mitigation: Add a function to remove stale validators: function removeStaleValidators(uint256 inactivityThreshold) external onlyOwner { for (uint256 i = 0; i < validators.length; i++) { if (block.timestamp - validators[i].lastActive > inactivityThreshold) { // Remove validator } } }
when_it_could_escalate: if combined with permissionless access, stale oracle data, or large unbounded sets
if protocol configuration makes this path critical to solvency or withdrawal availability
